inputs.name: connectionAliasName
inputs.description: Name of the MQTT connection alias to use to send the MQTT message.

inputs.name: topicName
inputs.description: Name of the topic to which to publish the message.

inputs.name: MqttMessage
inputs.description: Document (IData object) A document representing the MQTT message to publish to the MQTT server.

inputs.name: topicName
inputs.description: Name of the topic from which the message was received. An MQTT trigger can use wildcards to subscribe to multiple topics.

inputs.name: MqttMessage
inputs.description: Document (IData object) A document representing the MQTT message received by the MQTT trigger.
